name: Blink Charging Co.
description: Blink Charging Co. is a leading manufacturer, owner, operator, and provider of electric vehicle (EV) charging equipment and services. The company offers a comprehensive range of residential and commercial EV charging ports and connectivity solutions through its Blink Network, which utilizes proprietary cloud-based software to operate and manage EV charging stations. Blink's strategic focus includes forming partnerships with various property types, such as multifamily residences, workplaces, and healthcare facilities, to expand the global EV infrastructure and support the transition to sustainable transportation.
